<p><strong>Project Title: Music Album Collection Manager</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>Progression Statement:</strong></p><p>This HTML, CSS, and JavaScript project allows users to manage their personal music album collection. Users can enter an album name and release year, select a genre, and optionally mark an album as a favorite. Upon submission, the system validates the inputs and updates a dynamically generated list displaying album details in the order they were added. Favorite albums are displayed in a separate section to distinguish them from the regular collection.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Web Page Title:</strong> "Music Album Collection Manager"</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Folder Structure:</strong></p><p><span style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51);"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"></span></p><h3><br></h3>
